name: Benchmark Metals Inc.
summary: Benchmark Metals Inc., a junior resource company, engages in the identification, evaluation, acquisition, and exploration of mineral properties. The company explores for diamond, gold, and silver deposits. It holds a 100% interest in the Muskox, Hood River, and Contwoyto diamond projects located in Nunavut, Canada. The company also holds 100% interest in the Lawyers Property gold project located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Crystal Exploration Inc. and changed its name to Benchmark Metals Inc. in May 2018. Benchmark Metals Inc. was incorporated in 2010 and is headquartered in Edmonton, Canada.
